summary: STAGEPASS Preview App (iteration 4) - Advanced Social + Crossfade features verified. All backend APIs working. Frontend loads correctly with download functionality. Production ZIP verified to contain all fixed files with correct content.
passed_tests: Frontend: Home page loads with 'STAGEPASS PRODUCTION PACKAGE' heading
Frontend: 'PRODUCTION BUILD READY - MAR 2026' badge visible
Frontend: Download button works - triggers stagepass_final.zip download
Frontend: 12 feature cards visible under WHAT'S INCLUDED (expanded from original 8)
Frontend: Navigation between Feed, Dashboard, Radio, Live, Community works
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (45.2K views, $12,400 revenue, 1,200h watch time)
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/(public)/radio/page.tsx present with dual-audio crossfade engine (audioA/audioB refs)
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/lib/radio/scheduler.ts present with 'pool' variable fix
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/components/stagepass/FollowButton.tsx present with onToggle prop
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/api/radio/schedule/route.ts present with crossfade/mood settings in GET
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/api/radio/station/now/route.ts present with moodFilter parameter
ZIP Content: apps/web/src/app/(studio)/studio/uploads/page.tsx present with mood tag selector
ZIP Content: apps/web/public/favicon.svg present - new SVG favicon
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: /api/feed returns hardcoded data, /api/auth/login only accepts demo credentials - as designed for preview portal
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration verified: 1) Preview portal still works correctly, 2) Production ZIP contains all fixed files for Advanced Social + Crossfade features, 3) All TypeScript fixes are present in the ZIP (scheduler.ts pool fix, radio page dual-audio, FollowButton onToggle, schedule API crossfade/mood, station/now moodFilter, uploads page mood tags, new favicon). The STAGEPASS production code in /app/stagepass/ is NOT a running app - it's a codebase that gets zipped for download.
